xsl:when.test: (../../strikethrough_retail_price and ../../strikethrough_retail_price/@gross > price/@gross) or (../../promotion/price/normal_retail_price and ../../promotion/price/normal_retail_price/@gross > price/@gross) or (../../promotion/price/normal_retail_price and ../../price/@gross != price/@gross and ../../promotion/price/normal_retail_price/iaiext:site/iaiext:price_per_size[@id = ../../../../../sizes/size/@id]/@gross > price/@gross)

translate($clean,'0123456789.,','') != '' and contains($unitsList, concat('|', translate($clean,'0123456789.,',''), '|')) and string-length(translate($clean,'0123456789.,','')) > 0 and string-length(translate($clean,'0123456789.,','')) < 4 and string-length(translate($clean,'0123456789','')) < string-length($clean)

translate($clean,'0123456789.,','') = '' and string-length($clean) > 0 and string-length(translate($clean,'0123456789','')) < string-length($clean) and contains($unitsList, concat('|', substring-before(concat($rest,' '),' '), '|')) and not(contains($unitsList, concat('|', $clean, '|')))

contains($clean,'x') and translate(substring-before($clean,'x'),'0123456789.,','') = '' and translate(substring-after($clean,'x'),'0123456789.,','') != '' and contains($unitsList, concat('|', translate(substring-after($clean,'x'),'0123456789.,',''), '|'))
